html.p: Dropzone AI is a modern security automation platform built to streamline triage, enrichment, and response workflows for security operations teams. It helps eliminate manual toil and accelerates decision-making by integrating AI-driven context and automation directly into your detection and response pipelines.

img.style: width: 100%; max-width: 800px; height: auto; border: 1px solid #ddd;
img.alt: Three Pillars of AI SOC Analysts

html.h3: How does this Splunk Add-on help?

ul.li: Performs health checks against a Dropzone AI instance to validate connectivity and availability.
Collects investigation data including conclusions, attack surfaces, alert types, and executive summaries.
Provides dashboards to visualize health status, investigation trends, and security insights.
Enables search and analysis of Dropzone AI data alongside your other security events in Splunk.
Supports integration of Dropzone AI's AI-driven security automation into your Splunk workflows.

ol.li: Navigate to the Inputs page in the Dropzone AI Add-on.

Click Create New Input and select Dropzone AI Health Check to monitor instance health:
Enter a unique Name for the input (e.g., "dropzonehealthchecker")
Set the Interval in seconds (e.g., 60 for 1 minute)
Select an Index where data will be stored (e.g., "main")
Enter your Dropzone AI URL (e.g., https://app.dropzone.ai)
API Key is optional for health checks

Click Create New Input again and select Dropzone AI Investigations to collect investigation data:
Enter a unique Name (e.g., "dropzoneinvestigation")
Set the Interval in seconds (e.g., 300 for 5 minutes)
Select an Index (e.g., "default")
Enter your Dropzone AI URL
Enter your API Key in the format: Api-Key YOUR_KEY (required for investigations)
Click Add to create each input.
Activate both inputs using the toggle switches in the Status column.
Verify that health check and investigation events are being indexed (search for sourcetype=dropzone:healthcheck and sourcetype=dropzone:investigation).
View the Status dashboard to monitor availability and the Investigations dashboard to analyze investigation data.

ul.li: Health Checks: Monitors Dropzone AI instance availability (no API key required).
Investigations: Pulls completed investigations including conclusions, attack surfaces, alert details, and analysis summaries (API key required).

html.p: For more information, contact your Dropzone AI representative.
